name: What if other driver caused forklift accident but he's a coworker?
description: Comp benefits; sue third-party equipment providers.[3]

mainEntity.name: What if other driver caused forklift accident but he's a coworker?

acceptedAnswer.text: Comp benefits; sue third-party equipment providers.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Workers' comp covers you; can't sue coworker usually, but third-party if equipment maker at fault.** Exclusive remedy bars co-employee suits.[3] Key factors: Identify defective parts/manufacturers for separate negligence claim.[1][3] Comp pays regardless of who.
